name: Ohma
description: Bring the enemy to its knees with these twin electrified tonfas.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Bring the enemy to its knees with these twin electrified tonfas.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved the elemental FX of the Ohma’s to better follow the animation (most noticeable when holstered).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ohma’s lightning beam FX showing up from DoTs when it should just be from actual impacts.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.7.0
patchlogs.changes: *Acquire the Ohma From the Market today! The Ohma Blueprint can be found in the Market!
